2026-05-16.patch_summary: This patch introduces a new FUSE_PASSTHROUGH_INO mode, which enforces a one-to-one mapping between fuse inodes and backing file inode numbers. This mode is only supported on 64-bit architectures where the inode number is a u64 type. It allows the kernel to instantiate fuse inodes by passthrough lookup and readdirplus, and notifies the server about these inodes using their backing file inode numbers as unique identifiers. The patch modifies several files in the FUSE codebase to support this new mode, including fs/fuse/file.c, fs/fuse/fuse_i.h, fs/fuse/inode.c, and include/uapi/linux/fuse.h.
